title: Keto Sweet Bake Bites
description: Delicious keto sweet treats made with nuts and sweetener. Easy to make and perfect for snacking.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the almonds, sweetener, and chopped dark chocolate.
In a separate bowl, mix together the bake mix and finely chopped piccalilli.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Roll the dough into small balls and place on a baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Store in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 5 days.
